mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_facility_watch WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE risk_grade WHEN 'A' THEN 0 WHEN 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, next_check_date ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_facility_watch WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_facility_watch WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_facility_watch WHERE deleted = 0 AND risk_grade = #{risk}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_facility_watch ( name, facility_type, risk_grade, location, owner_user_id, owner_name, cycle, last_check_date, next_check_date, anomaly, action, risk_pct, reason, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{facilityType}, #{riskGrade}, #{location}, #{ownerUserId}, #{ownerName}, #{cycle}, #{lastCheckDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{nextCheckDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{anomaly}, #{action}, #{riskPct}0, #{reason}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_facility_watch SET name = #{name}, facility_type = #{facilityType}, risk_grade = #{riskGrade}, location = #{location}, owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}, owner_name = #{ownerName}, cycle = #{cycle}, last_check_date = #{lastCheckDate,jdbcType=DATE}, next_check_date = #{nextCheckDate,jdbcType=DATE}, anomaly = #{anomaly}, action = #{action}, risk_pct = #{riskPct}0, reason = #{reason}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_facility_watch SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
